basic_details.organization_name: Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL)
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Posts • Technician • RRB29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Vacancies • Nursing Officer13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Openings • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,318 postsKSP Civil Police Constable Online Form 20263,991 Vacancies • Civil Police Constable • KSP03 Jul 20263,991 postsMPSC 2619 Group C Online Form 20262,619 Openings • Group C17 Jul 20262,619 posts

qualification.education_qualification: Retired officers from Railways/ Govt./ PSUs/ Ports in specified CDA/IDA scales, Experience in relevant infrastructure/ railway projects
qualification.details: Manager (Electrical): Officers who have taken VR or retired on superannuation from Railways, Other Govt. Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, JV Companies under Govt. control in PB-2 GP 4600 (CDA) or E-2 IDA scale with experience in execution of Infrastructure Projects, specifically Railway Electric Traction Projects, General Power Supply Projects, Air Conditioning, Building electrification, Road Lightings etc. Manager (S&T): Officers who have taken VR or retired on superannuation from Railways, Other Govt. Departments, Central PSUs, Ports, JV Companies under Govt. control in PB-2 GP 4600 (CDA) or E-2 IDA scale with overall service experience in Signal & Telecommunication Engineering in the field of Railways, specifically Planning, Estimation, Designing, FSR & DPR, Installation, Testing & commissioning and maintenance of all kinds of Signaling & Telecommunication works of Railway Systems.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility and experience Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.iprcl.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 30-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IPRCL Manager posts?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the applications for the IPRCL Manager posts is 30th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Manager posts will receive a salary in the range of Rs. 50,000 to Rs. 1,60,000 per month, as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Manager post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Manager post, with one each for Manager (Electrical) and Manager (S&T).

faq.question: Q4. What is the maximum age limit for the IPRCL Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applying to the Manager posts is 63 years, as specified in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for the Manager posts?
faq.answer: The eligibility criteria require retired officers from Railways, Govt. Departments, PSUs, or Ports with specific experience in infrastructure/railway projects, particularly in Electrical or Signal & Telecommunication fields.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IPRCL Manager recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Manager posts?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility and experience, followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Port Rail and Ropeway Corporation (IPRCL).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of IPRCL, which is www.iprcl.in. The direct link to the website is provided in the Important Links section.
